query:
-- These "SmileTel supplied NBN voice and internet bundle" items mention 4G backup as a component
-- They are Xero billing items (revenue), not standalone supplier costs - skip them
-- They have supplierName = 'SmileTel' which means they are revenue items

-- The standalone 4G internet services from Unknown supplier need $15 default
-- BUT Middlemount Coal (3 sites × 125GB) and Riverside Development (250GB) are large dedicated 4G services
-- that likely cost much more than $15/mo - flag them for review instead

UPDATE services
SET 
  monthlyCost = 15.00,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(
    COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''),
    ' | [DEFAULT COST APPLIED] 4G SIM default cost $15.00/mo (Vocus/TIAB - no supplier price detected)'
  )
WHERE planName LIKE '%4G%'
  AND supplierName NOT IN ('SmileTel', 'Xero')
  AND monthlyCost = 0.00
  AND monthlyRevenue <= 100.00
  AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%')
  AND status != 'terminated';

-- Flag the large 4G internet services for manual review (not $15 default - these are dedicated services)
UPDATE services
SET 
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(
    COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''),
    ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] Large dedicated 4G internet service - cost likely much higher than $15/mo default. Check with provider.'
  )
WHERE planName LIKE '%4G%'
  AND supplierName NOT IN ('SmileTel', 'Xero')
  AND monthlyCost = 0.00
  AND monthlyRevenue > 100.00
  AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%COST REVIEW NEEDED%')
  AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%')
  AND status != 'terminated';

-- Final count of all 4G-related services and their cost status
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN discoveryNotes LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%' THEN 'Default $15 applied'
    WHEN discoveryNotes LIKE '%COST REVIEW NEEDED%' THEN 'Flagged for review'
    WHEN monthlyCost > 0 AND monthlyCost != 15.00 THEN 'Has real cost'
    WHEN monthlyCost = 15.00 AND discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%' THEN 'Has $15 cost (Vocus SIM)'
    WHEN supplierName IN ('SmileTel', 'Xero') THEN 'Revenue item (skip)'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END as status,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue,
  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost
FROM services
WHERE (
  planName LIKE '%4G%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Failover SIM%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Backup SIM%'
)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

  AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%')

-- Final count of all 4G-related services and their cost status

    WHEN monthlyCost > 0 AND monthlyCost != 15.00 THEN 'Has real cost'
    WHEN monthlyCost = 15.00 AND discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%' THEN 'Has $15 cost (Vocus SIM)'
    WHEN supplierName IN ('SmileTel', 'Xero') THEN 'Revenue item (skip)'
    ELSE 'Other'
